title: eminium rauwolffii
intro: Eminium rauwolffii, also known as the 'Tiger's Eye', is a type of orchid that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Eminium rauwolffii is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional remedies, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
